items.title: Track AI evaluation containment guidance
items.question: Does the fuller incident report add reusable controls for network, identity, monitoring and emergency shutdown?

items.title: Audit sensitive-data permission design
items.question: Do talent and rhythm pages make source, allowed use, withdrawal and external-action confirmation explicit?

items.title: Draft travel insurance check card
items.question: Can the card distinguish accident, overseas medical, inconvenience and exclusions without implying coverage?

items.title: Draft micro-EV insurance reminder
items.question: Can a three-step reminder route users to the official policy lookup without collecting vehicle data?

items.title: Clarify futures night-session alerts
items.question: Can the card clearly separate real-time status, simulated risk information and actual execution outcomes?

items.title: Review social procurement conversion path
items.question: Does the official marketplace make product, organization and accessibility information sufficient for a respectful purchase decision?
